summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 30.2 Hypothesis Ranking Engine. All 22 tests passed including 12 PHASE 30.1 pool engine tests and 10 new PHASE 30.2 ranking engine tests. All ranking features working correctly: duplicate suppression, dominance penalty, diversity penalty, directional balance, and ranking metadata.
passed_tests: GET /api/v1/hypothesis/ranked/{symbol} endpoint returns ranked pool with diversification
GET /api/v1/hypothesis/ranked/history/{symbol} endpoint returns ranked pool history
directional_balance calculation and return in response
ranking_metadata structure with duplicates_removed, dominance_penalty_applied, diversity_penalties_applied
Duplicate suppression logic - only strongest hypothesis of same type retained
Dominance penalty application when ≥3 hypotheses in same direction
Diversity penalty application when structural scores too similar
Filtering thresholds and ranking score formulas
All PHASE 30.1 hypothesis pool engine functionality
